name: Braised Leeks & Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the sherry and bring it to a simmering point.
3. Stir in the thinly sliced leeks and cook for 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add the thinly sliced shiitakes and sauté for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Pour in the orange juice and grated orange peel.
6. Stir in the apple cider vinegar.
7. Remove from heat and season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve warm.
